PROGRAM NAME UNKNOWN: 2 errors were found in 2 categories
      help-params:
            Bad parameter name: "not-a-param2"
            To see a list of parameter names try "-help-show params-named".
            To see a full list, add "-help-all".
            To see just the names, add "-help-summary".
            At: [command line]: Supplied Parameter:2: "-help-param=not-a-param2"
      param2:
            this parameter must be set somewhere

For more information use the "-help" parameter
